ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data collection */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "feels_like" REAL /* Feels like temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "pressure" INTEGER /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "uvi" REAL /* UV Index */,
  "clouds" INTEGER /* Cloud cover in percentage */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in meters */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_deg" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Wind gust in meters per second */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition */,
  "precipitation_probability" INTEGER /* Probability of precipitation in percentage */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data collection */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the weather data collection */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data for historical tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_code" INTEGER /* Code of the weather condition */,
  "main" TEXT /* Main weather condition (e.g., Clouds, Rain) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the weather condition */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the weather condition */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the weather condition (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the weather condition */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the location details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data source is located */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the data source */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Next maintenance due date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
